events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes drywall installed with "no gap at floor." GA-216 and IRC require a gap (typically 3/8" to 1/2") at floor for drywall to prevent moisture wicking and allow movement. No gap at floor is a defect. This is installed-defective and non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (moisture wicking, cracking). Work stage: rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 70. Confidence high.
